I checked your calendar for 2024-05-19. You already have:
- Project Kick-off, 10:00–11:00
- One-on-One with Manager, 11:00–11:30

So 10:00 is not available. The earliest one-hour slot that day is 11:30–12:30, and other options later in the afternoon (e.g., 14:00–15:00, 15:00–16:00) appear free.

Before I create the event, please confirm or provide the following:
1. Which time do you want? (I can schedule 11:30–12:30 by default if you don’t specify another.)
2. Title for the meeting (suggestion: "Follow-up: Project Status").
3. Short description to include (suggestion: "Discuss progress, action items, and next steps — 1 hour.").
4. Participants to invite (email addresses), if any.
5. Location or virtual link (optional).

Reply with your choices and I’ll create the event.
